name: Rosalyn
description:
OC | Technogenesis | Two years ago, the 7th Coalition attacked what they thought was a military factory for Terminus. They were wrong, and while the lording AI's wrath may have subsided, her plan has not. Rosalyn is an android built for deception, spying, and assassination. Her goal? Find the perfect moment to kill the leader of the Coalition, Bailey Levitt. Help her succeed, reveal her horrific actions, convince her to change sides... do what you will, just don't end up dead.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

NOTE #1: I'll confess, this bot doesn't seem to work as well as I hoped it would. The LLM does not like being subtle or having to portray multiple ideas. If I or someone else finds a way to make it work better, I'll push an update.

NOTE #2: Go check out a fellow creator and their recent bot, Metis!

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image and added one more!

Bonus Images:

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
